Truong hop (Edge Case/Failure): Meeting khong ai duoc assign ro rang - AI doan nguoi chiu trach nhiem
Hanh dong tuc thoi (Mitigation): Hien thi Chua xac dinh owner - yeu cau user confirm truoc khi gui
Hau qua: Gui email sai nguoi - conflict noi bo
Xu ly tiep theo (Long-term Solution): Product: Them buoc Preview & Confirm bat buoc. Tech: Dung speaker diarization de map ten nguoi noi voi action item.

Truong hop (Edge Case/Failure): Nhieu nguoi noi cung luc / tieng on - AI bat nham cau noi thuong thanh action item
Hanh dong tuc thoi (Mitigation): Danh dau confidence thap - highlight de human review
Hau qua: Tom tat sai - action item ao - mat thoi gian follow-up
Xu ly tiep theo (Long-term Solution): Tech: Them confidence score cho tung action item. Product: Cho phep user edit truoc khi gui.

Truong hop (Edge Case/Failure): Khong co buoc review truoc khi gui - AI tu gui email ngay sau meeting
Hanh dong tuc thoi (Mitigation): Them buoc Preview & Confirm bat buoc truoc khi gui
Hau qua: AI tom tat sai + tu gui - khong thu hoi duoc - mat tin
Xu ly tiep theo (Long-term Solution): Product: Khong bao gio auto-send khong qua review. Tech: Queue email 5 phut de user co the cancel.

Truong hop (Edge Case/Failure): Meeting da ngon ngu hoac tieng Anh lan tieng Viet
Hanh dong tuc thoi (Mitigation): Canh bao: Phat hien da ngon ngu - do chinh xac co the thap hon
Hau qua: Tom tat thieu hoac sai ngu nghia
Xu ly tiep theo (Long-term Solution): Tech: Huan luyen model voi dataset code-switching Viet-Anh.

Truong hop (Edge Case/Failure): Spec khong dinh nghia tom tat tot la gi - khong co ground truth
Hanh dong tuc thoi (Mitigation): Cho user rate chat luong tom tat (thumbs up/down)
Hau qua: AI khong tu cai thien duoc - chat luong khong dong deu
Xu ly tiep theo (Long-term Solution): Product: Thu thap feedback - dung lam RLHF data. Dinh nghia rubric ro rang cho tom tat.
